blurb: A few years ago I realized I'd been living in the same city for over 10 years but didn't have that much documentation of just the mundane things around me (Instagram doesn't count!!). I'm trying to challenge myself to (1) notice more of the everyday, (2) actually remember to bring a camera with me when I go out for random walks or day outings, not just when traveling or seeing something "new", and (3) notice things, take photos of them, and share them. Here are a bunch of those snapshots from the last few years, roughly in geographic order from Queens to Manhattan to Brooklyn and east to west to south. (Why geographic? Why not 🤷‍♀️)
subtitle: Has anyone ever taken cool street photos in New York City and posted them on the internet? Well, you're welcome.
title: NYC street photos
